creator: natbsd@instinctive.eu
text:
(In reply to Sevan Janiyan from comment #5)

`-maproot=root` is needed because otherwise root on the PXE machine (NFS client) is mapped to nobody on the NFS server, which makes it impossible to execute /sbin/shutdown (and therefore switch off cleanly the PXE machine), to read /etc/spwd.db (and therefore authenticate users), and a few other useful system things.
